errors.name: Disney's Winnie the Pooh Show
errors.message:
Command failed: npx convex run seed:importWikipediaProductionsForShow '{"showName":"Disney's Winnie the Pooh Show","showType":"musical","wikipediaTitle":"Disney's Winnie the Pooh Show (musical)"}'
error: too many arguments for 'run'. Expected 2 arguments but got 6.

Usage: convex run [options] <functionName> [args]

Run a function (query, mutation, or action) on your deployment

Arguments:
  functionName                        identifier of the function to run, like
                                      `listMessages` or `dir/file:myFunction`
  args                                JSON-formatted arguments object to pass to
                                      the function.

Options:
  -w, --watch                         Watch a query, printing its result if the
                                      underlying data changes. Given function
                                      must be a query.
  --push                              Push code to deployment before running the
                                      function.
  --identity <identity>               JSON-formatted UserIdentity object, e.g.
                                      '{ name: "John", address: "0x123" }'
  --typecheck <mode>                  Whether to check TypeScript files with
                                      `tsc --noEmit`. (choices: "enable", "try",
                                      "disable", default: "try")
  --typecheck-components              Check TypeScript files within component
                                      implementations with `tsc --noEmit`.
                                      (default: false)
  --codegen <mode>                    Regenerate code in `convex/_generated/`
                                      (choices: "enable", "disable", default:
                                      "enable")
  --component <path>                  Path to the component in the component
                                      tree defined in convex.config.ts.
  --env-file <envFile>                Path to a custom file of environment
                                      variables, for choosing the deployment,
                                      e.g. CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT or
                                      CONVEX_SELF_HOSTED_URL. Same format as
                                      .env.local or .env files, and overrides
                                      them.
  --prod                              Run the function on this project's
                                      production deployment.
  --preview-name <previewName>        Run the function on the preview deployment
                                      with the given name.
  --deployment-name <deploymentName>  Run the function on the specified
                                      deployment.
  -h, --help                          display help for command

Command failed: npx convex run seed:importWikipediaProductionsForShow '{"showName":"Ain't Misbehavin'","showType":"musical","wikipediaTitle":"Ain't Misbehavin' (musical)"}'
error: too many arguments for 'run'. Expected 2 arguments but got 4.

Usage: convex run [options] <functionName> [args]

Run a function (query, mutation, or action) on your deployment

Arguments:
  functionName                        identifier of the function to run, like
                                      `listMessages` or `dir/file:myFunction`
  args                                JSON-formatted arguments object to pass to
                                      the function.

Options:
  -w, --watch                         Watch a query, printing its result if the
                                      underlying data changes. Given function
                                      must be a query.
  --push                              Push code to deployment before running the
                                      function.
  --identity <identity>               JSON-formatted UserIdentity object, e.g.
                                      '{ name: "John", address: "0x123" }'
  --typecheck <mode>                  Whether to check TypeScript files with
                                      `tsc --noEmit`. (choices: "enable", "try",
                                      "disable", default: "try")
  --typecheck-components              Check TypeScript files within component
                                      implementations with `tsc --noEmit`.
                                      (default: false)
  --codegen <mode>                    Regenerate code in `convex/_generated/`
                                      (choices: "enable", "disable", default:
                                      "enable")
  --component <path>                  Path to the component in the component
                                      tree defined in convex.config.ts.
  --env-file <envFile>                Path to a custom file of environment
                                      variables, for choosing the deployment,
                                      e.g. CONVEX_DEPLOYMENT or
                                      CONVEX_SELF_HOSTED_URL. Same format as
                                      .env.local or .env files, and overrides
                                      them.
  --prod                              Run the function on this project's
                                      production deployment.
  --preview-name <previewName>        Run the function on the preview deployment
                                      with the given name.
  --deployment-name <deploymentName>  Run the function on the specified
                                      deployment.
  -h, --help                          display help for command
